expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading

(Report-builder loading)".

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md frames the evaluation as phase4a throughout: title "phase4a", section "Primary phase under test **Phase 4a**", and an explicit "Phase 4a alignment check (per contract)" stating "Subcategory-only structure: satisfied" and "Atomic steps + verification leaves: satisfied"; the proposed scenarios are described as "Phase 4a contract style: subcategory → scenario → atomic nested steps → observable leaves".
